name: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc.
summary: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. is a specialized provider of mission-ready AI technology serving defense, national security, travel, and trade markets. The company offers products including Ask Sage (a FedRAMP-authorized generative AI platform), ConductorOS (an AI/data/sensor orchestration platform for edge defense environments), computer vision, biometrics, predictive analytics, and digital identity verification solutions. Founded to serve defense and national security customers, BigBear.ai also partners with select commercial clients for supply chain transparency and process optimization.
